channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7374] obdfilter-survey test_1a: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e7959134-7e43-11e5-9c23-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_1a failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

OST Console:

04:59:47:txg_sync      D 0000000000000000     0 24601      2 0x00000080
04:59:47: ffff8800603b7b60 0000000000000046 0000000000000000 0000234b40c405c6
04:59:47: ffff88007c4e0078 ffff8800615d39f0 0000063a200c30f5 ffffffffa9ce7310
04:59:47: 000000001f9a63a1 000000010063e514 ffff88007c4e05f8 ffff8800603b7fd8
04:59:47:Call Trace:
04:59:47: [<ffffffff815395c3>] io_schedule+0x73/0xc0
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa01a6f8f>] cv_wait_common+0xaf/0x130 [spl]
04:59:47: [<ffffffff810a1460>] ? autoremove_wake_function+0x0/0x40
04:59:47: [<ffffffff8106ee1a>] ? __cond_resched+0x2a/0x40
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa01a7028>] __cv_wait_io+0x18/0x20 [spl]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa02b12eb>] zio_wait+0x10b/0x1e0 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa0238b9b>] dsl_pool_sync+0x2bb/0x440 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa024fbbe>] spa_sync+0x35e/0xb10 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffff81059939>] ? __wake_up_common+0x59/0x90
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa0266278>] txg_sync_thread+0x3d8/0x670 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa0265ea0>] ? txg_sync_thread+0x0/0x670 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa0265ea0>] ? txg_sync_thread+0x0/0x670 [zfs]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa01a2338>] thread_generic_wrapper+0x68/0x80 [spl]
04:59:47: [<ffffffffa01a22d0>] ? thread_generic_wrapper+0x0/0x80 [spl]
04:59:47: [<ffffffff810a0fce>] kthread+0x9e/0xc0
04:59:47: [<ffffffff8100c28a>] child_rip+0xa/0x20
04:59:47: [<ffffffff810a0f30>] ? kthread+0x0/0xc0
04:59:47: [<ffffffff8100c280>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20

MDS console:

05:00:04:auditd        D 0000000000000000     0  1363      1 0x00000000
05:00:04: ffff880037d3fcc8 0000000000000082 0000000000000000 000022f0d1394596
05:00:04: ffff880037ea0070 ffff88003767e8a0 00000634ad4c8f47 ffffffffa9ce72d4
05:00:04: 00000000254560d2 00000001006388f5 ffff8800778ad068 ffff880037d3ffd8
05:00:04:Call Trace:
05:00:04: [<ffffffff81127540>] ? sync_page+0x0/0x50
05:00:04: [<ffffffff81538d33>] io_schedule+0x73/0xc0
05:00:04: [<ffffffff8112757d>] sync_page+0x3d/0x50
05:00:04: [<ffffffff815397ff>] __wait_on_bit+0x5f/0x90
05:00:04: [<ffffffff811277b3>] wait_on_page_bit+0x73/0x80
05:00:04: [<ffffffff810a14e0>] ? wake_bit_function+0x0/0x50
05:00:04: [<ffffffff8113d8d5>] ? pagevec_lookup_tag+0x25/0x40
05:00:04: [<ffffffff81127bdb>] wait_on_page_writeback_range+0xfb/0x190
05:00:04: [<ffffffff8113c934>] ? generic_writepages+0x24/0x30
05:00:04: [<ffffffff8113c975>] ? do_writepages+0x35/0x40
05:00:04: [<ffffffff81127d2b>] ? __filemap_fdatawrite_range+0x5b/0x60
05:00:04: [<ffffffff81127da8>] filemap_write_and_wait_range+0x78/0x90
05:00:04: [<ffffffff811c45ce>] vfs_fsync_range+0x7e/0x100
05:00:04: [<ffffffff811c46bd>] vfs_fsync+0x1d/0x20
05:00:04: [<ffffffff811c46fe>] do_fsync+0x3e/0x60
05:00:04: [<ffffffff811c4750>] sys_fsync+0x10/0x20
05:00:04: [<ffffffff8100b0d2>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
item.summary: obdfilter-survey test_1a: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This is a duplicate of LU-4950.
